category_sources: source_facts.description says "Terminal JSON viewer"; official fx site describes a terminal JSON viewer and processor with JavaScript processing.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is fx; official repository is antonmedv/fx.
docs_sources: Official fx site has Docs/Guides navigation and a Getting Started documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/antonmedv/fx; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says terminal JSON viewer; official fx site lists interactive TUI JSON viewing, JavaScript processing, JSON streaming, YAML/TOML support, and terminal autocompletion.
